race.description: 2026 Yabby Dam Farms The Great Square Trot (G1)
race.comment: I AM HELLBOUND (11) knows how to win, scoring for the fifth time in his last six starts when he worked to the front from a similar draw for a 2.5m win at this circuit and distance last week. Tackles a stronger line-up but beat some Inter Dominion contenders for a G3 win at Menangle prior. With a touch of luck he is a player at each way odds. JILLIBY DREAMLOVER (6) comes off a surprise defeat at Melton last week but only missed narrowly and was first-up for eight weeks so the hitout should have improved her. Placed at G1 level in three of her previous four starts so has the class. MECARNO (12) was Victoria's top three-year-old of last season, winning the Victoria Derby, Vicbred and Breeders Crown finals. Tricky draw but could be ready to show his best third up. Talented Kiwi DASH DOSH NZ (4) makes her Australian debut but won from a wide draw last start at Addington and beat race rival TRACY THE JET to win last season's NZ Oaks. CRACKERJACK NZ (13) impressed fresh at Melton. Worth including.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *[GROUP 1] Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $150,000
